stemHtml: In Low Visibility Operations (LVO), an aircraft is preparing for a flight and has been dispatched. However, there is a technical issue which could prevent its landing capability. Which of the following applies?

options.a: The pilot-in-command shall be satisfied that the status of the aircraft and of the relevant airborne systems is appropriate for the specific operation to be conducted.
options.b: The operator shall be satisfied that the status of the aircraft and of the relevant airborne systems is appropriate for the specific operation to be conducted.
options.c: The pilot-in-command shall ensure that the required equipment is available and functional according the the current Minimum Equipment List (MEL).
options.d: The operator shall ensure that the required equipment is available and functional according the the current Minimum Equipment List (MEL).
